creator: kuriyama@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed with modifications below.  Thanks! 

o Change PKGNAME ja-postgresql-6.4. 
o Use TAB instead of spaces. 
o Manpage entries are not needed in PLIST. 
o Add code for creation of group "pgsql" into pkg/INSTALL. 
o Use ${WRKDIR}/PLIST for dynamic PLIST creation. 

This version of port does not support complete packing list 
for -DMULTIBYTE, -DUSE_PERL or -DUSE_ODBC options.  I'll 
fix it later.
